---
title: "Medical Moving Intentions"
subtitle: "A survey-based study on [topic]"
author:
  - name: "[Your Name]"
    affiliation: "[Institution]"
    email: "[email]"
  - name: "[Co-author Name]"
    affiliation: "[Institution]"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

## About this project

*[1–2 sentence summary of the research question and why it matters.]*

## Status

| Milestone | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Data collection | ✅ Complete |
| Data cleaning | 🔄 In progress |
| Analysis | ⏳ Pending |
| Writing | ⏳ Pending |
| Submission | ⏳ Pending |

## Research question

*[State the primary research question(s).]*

## Data

*[Brief description of the survey: how many respondents, when collected, key variables.]*

## Preliminary findings

*[Fill in as the project progresses.]*

## Team

| Name | Role | Institution |
|------|------|-------------|
| [Name] | PI | [Institution] |
| [Name] | Co-author | [Institution] |

## Contact

For questions about this project, contact [name] at [email].
